values.fullName: Accurately detecting disorders in newborns earlier and more efficiently
Analytical testing to support the environmental requirements of the mining industry
Assuring science and risk-based drug manufacturing meets QbD and compliance regulations
Detecting soil contaminants and identifying unknown soil pollutants
Determining the efficacy and safety of a drug in human subjects
Determining the safety and efficacy of a drug candidate prior to clinical trials
Eliminating the challenges associated with genomic analysis
Ensuring confident results in forensic and security applications
Ensuring food safety and regulatory compliance
Gaining critical insights from data analytics
Identifying and validating disease-relevant targets and leads
Identifying the risk of pregnancy-related complications earlier
Measuring a wide range of components in petrochemicals
Meeting chemical quality specifications and innovating next generation products
Meeting the regulations and standards of safe drinking and environmental waters
Monitoring indoor and outdoor air to ensure compliance
Understanding diseases and why they occur
Verification and Monitoring of Food Quality Standards
